Multi Scaler callback function type.
Configuration table for multi-scaler devices.

detaileddescription.para: Configuration table for multi-scaler devices.

This table contains the configuration information for each MultiScaler device in the system. Each entry includes:
Device ID: Unique identifier for the device instance
Base Address: AXI control interface base address
Samples Per Clock: Number of samples processed per clock cycle
Max Data Width: Maximum pixel data width supported
Max Cols: Maximum number of horizontal pixels
Max Rows: Maximum number of vertical pixels
Phase Shift: Scaling phase shift precision
Scale Mode: Supported scaling modes (bilinear, polyphase, etc.)
Taps: Number of filter taps for polyphase scaling
Max Outs: Maximum number of output channels supported
The table is indexed by device ID for lookup during initialization.

briefdescription.para: Initialize the Multi Scaler driver instance using base address.

detaileddescription.para: This function locates the device configuration based on the base address and calls the configuration initialization function. The instance must be initialized before using any other driver functions. The base address is typically obtained from the device tree.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance to be initialized.
is the physical base address of the device.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization was successful, XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if the configuration for the base address was not found.
This function is used in SDT (Software Development Toolkit) builds.

briefdescription.para: Lookup the device configuration by base address.

detaileddescription.para: This function searches the configuration table for a device matching the specified base address. The configuration table is populated at compile time based on the device tree configuration. If BaseAddress is 0, the first entry in the table is returned.

parameterdescription.para: is the physical base address of the device. If 0, returns the first configuration entry.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the configuration structure if found, NULL otherwise.
This function is used in SDT (Software Development Toolkit) builds.

briefdescription.para: Initialize the Multi Scaler core instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function initializes the Multi Scaler driver/device instance with the configuration parameters from the provided config structure. It copies configuration parameters and sets the instance to ready state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance to be worked on
is a pointer to the configuration structure containing hardware build-time parameters

simplesect.para: The calling application must memset the instance structure to zero before passing it to this function

briefdescription.para: Start the Multi Scaler core.

detaileddescription.para: This function starts the Multi Scaler hardware by setting the AP_START bit in the control register. Auto-restart mode is preserved if previously set.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance

briefdescription.para: Check if Multi Scaler processing is done.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks the AP_DONE bit in the control register to determine if the Multi Scaler has completed the current frame processing.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance

simplesect.para: Non-zero if the core has finished processing the current frame, zero otherwise

briefdescription.para: Check if Multi Scaler is idle.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks the AP_IDLE bit in the control register to determine if the Multi Scaler hardware is currently idle (not processing).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance

simplesect.para: Non-zero if the core is idle, zero if it is actively processing

briefdescription.para: Check if Multi Scaler is ready for next operation.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks if the Multi Scaler is ready to accept new input by verifying that the AP_START bit is not set in the control register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance

simplesect.para: Non-zero if the core is ready for next input, zero otherwise

briefdescription.para: Enable auto-restart mode for Multi Scaler.

detaileddescription.para: This function enables the auto-restart feature, allowing the Multi Scaler to automatically restart processing after completing the current frame.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance

briefdescription.para: Disable auto-restart mode for Multi Scaler.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the auto-restart feature, requiring manual restart after each frame processing operation completes.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance

simplesect.para: The number of output channels currently configured

briefdescription.para: Set input width for channel 0.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the input image width for channel 0 to the hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance

simplesect.para: Similar Set/Get functions exist for all 8 channels (0-7) and follow the same pattern for Width, Height, Stride, Rate, Format, and Buffer address parameters

simplesect.para: Total size of the vfltCoeff_0 memory region in bytes

briefdescription.para: Get bit width of vertical filter coefficient memory bank 0.

briefdescription.para: Get depth of vertical filter coefficient memory bank 0.

simplesect.para: Depth (number of coefficient entries) in the memory bank

briefdescription.para: Write words to vertical filter coefficient memory bank 0.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes integer words to the vertical filter coefficient memory bank 0 starting at the specified offset.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance
is the word offset from the base address
is a pointer to the data array to write
is the number of words to write

simplesect.para: Number of words written, or 0 if the write would exceed memory bounds

briefdescription.para: Read words from vertical filter coefficient memory bank 0.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads integer words from the vertical filter coefficient memory bank 0 starting at the specified offset.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance
is the word offset from the base address
is a pointer to the buffer to store the read data
is the number of words to read

simplesect.para: Number of words read, or 0 if the read would exceed memory bounds

briefdescription.para: Write bytes to vertical filter coefficient memory bank 0.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes individual bytes to the vertical filter coefficient memory bank 0 starting at the specified offset.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance
is the byte offset from the base address
is a pointer to the byte array to write
is the number of bytes to write

simplesect.para: Number of bytes written, or 0 if the write would exceed memory bounds

briefdescription.para: Read bytes from vertical filter coefficient memory bank 0.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads individual bytes from the vertical filter coefficient memory bank 0 starting at the specified offset.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance
is the byte offset from the base address
is a pointer to the buffer to store the read bytes
is the number of bytes to read

simplesect.para: Number of bytes read, or 0 if the read would exceed memory bounds

briefdescription.para: Get base address of horizontal filter coefficient memory bank 0.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the base address of the horizontal filter coefficient memory bank 0 in the hardware address space.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance

simplesect.para: Base address of the hfltCoeff_0 memory region

briefdescription.para: Get high address of horizontal filter coefficient memory bank 0.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the high address of the horizontal filter coefficient memory bank 0 in the hardware address space.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance

simplesect.para: High address of the hfltCoeff_0 memory region

briefdescription.para: Get total size of horizontal filter coefficient memory bank 0.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the total size in bytes of the horizontal filter coefficient memory bank 0.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance

simplesect.para: Total size of the hfltCoeff_0 memory region in bytes

briefdescription.para: Get bit width of horizontal filter coefficient memory bank 0.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the bit width of each coefficient entry in the horizontal filter coefficient memory bank 0.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance

briefdescription.para: Get depth of horizontal filter coefficient memory bank 0.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the depth (number of entries) of the horizontal filter coefficient memory bank 0.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance

simplesect.para: Depth (number of coefficient entries) in the memory bank

briefdescription.para: Write words to horizontal filter coefficient memory bank 0.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes integer words to the horizontal filter coefficient memory bank 0 starting at the specified offset.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance
is the word offset from the base address
is a pointer to the data array to write
is the number of words to write

simplesect.para: Number of words written, or 0 if the write would exceed memory bounds

briefdescription.para: Read words from horizontal filter coefficient memory bank 0.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads integer words from the horizontal filter coefficient memory bank 0 starting at the specified offset.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance
is the word offset from the base address
is a pointer to the buffer to store the read data
is the number of words to read

simplesect.para: Number of words read, or 0 if the read would exceed memory bounds

briefdescription.para: Write bytes to horizontal filter coefficient memory bank 0.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes individual bytes to the horizontal filter coefficient memory bank 0 starting at the specified offset.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance
is the byte offset from the base address
is a pointer to the byte array to write
is the number of bytes to write

simplesect.para: Number of bytes written, or 0 if the write would exceed memory bounds

briefdescription.para: Enable global interrupts for Multi Scaler.

detaileddescription.para: This function enables the global interrupt enable bit, allowing interrupts from the Multi Scaler to be propagated to the system.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance

briefdescription.para: Disable global interrupts for Multi Scaler.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the global interrupt enable bit, preventing interrupts from the Multi Scaler from reaching the system.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance

briefdescription.para: Enable specific interrupt sources.

detaileddescription.para: This function enables interrupt sources specified by the mask parameter. Multiple sources can be enabled by ORing the appropriate bits.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance
is the bitmask of interrupt sources to enable

briefdescription.para: Disable specific interrupt sources.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables interrupt sources specified by the mask parameter. Multiple sources can be disabled by ORing the appropriate bits.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance
is the bitmask of interrupt sources to disable

briefdescription.para: Clear pending interrupts.

detaileddescription.para: This function clears the interrupt status bits specified by the mask parameter. This should be called in the interrupt handler to acknowledge processed interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance
is the bitmask of interrupt sources to clear

briefdescription.para: Get enabled interrupt sources.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the current interrupt enable register value indicating which interrupt sources are enabled.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance

briefdescription.para: Get pending interrupt status.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the current interrupt status register value indicating which interrupt sources are currently pending.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the MultiScaler core driver.

detaileddescription.para: This handler clears the pending interrupt and determines if the source is frame done signal. If yes, calls the registered callback function.
The application is responsible for connecting this function to the interrupt system.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the core instance that just interrupted.

briefdescription.para: Install an asynchronous callback function for MultiScaler events.

detaileddescription.para: This function registers a user-defined callback function that will be invoked when the MultiScaler IP generates an interrupt. The callback is typically used to handle frame processing completion notifications.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the MultiScaler IP instance.
is the address of the callback function.
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.
